content: Curiosity-driven exploration signals from ICM/RND can be repurposed as meta-learning gating signals to prioritize which new episodic memories get consolidated into long-term agent memory, rather than only using them to drive reward for exploration. This creates a self-regulating system where the agent’s own intrinsic surprise naturally curates its memory for future few-shot task adaptation.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
